One-off change-intelligence report

Tag and Genre Momentum Report

This pass measures market-facing taxonomy drift across all Steam games in the current change-history window. The main question is not just what moved, but what is accelerating versus cooling.

Raw event window UTC: 2026-03-14 07:17:19.18866+00 to 2026-04-06 18:45:12.715621+00. Report day buckets use America/Los_Angeles, covering 2026-03-14 to 2026-04-06.

1,578Games touched
6,870Raw tag moves
1,291Raw genre moves
2026-03-14 to 2026-03-21Early comparison window
2026-03-30 to 2026-04-06Late comparison window
Primary read

Use the scatter first. Upper-right tags are net-up and accelerating. Lower-left tags are net-down and weakening.

Dumbbell logic

Open dots are the early-window average daily net. Filled dots are the late-window average daily net.

Full inventory

The heatmap keeps every raw tag visible without turning the overview into label soup.

All Raw Tags: Net Change vs Momentum Delta

X-axis is full-window net change. Y-axis is momentum delta, comparing the late-window daily net average to the early-window daily net average.
